{
  "analysis": "The Python script successfully executed the full gravitational wave detection pipeline. It:
1. Loaded the data from /root/data/PyCBC_T2_2.gwf
2. Conditioned the data (high-pass filter, resample, crop, PSD estimation)
3. Performed matched filtering with grid search over mass parameters for 3 approximants
4. Found the strongest signal for each approximant
5. Wrote the results to /root/detection_results.csv

The output shows the best SNR and total mass for each approximant. The results are saved in the requested CSV format.",
  "plan": "The task is complete. No further actions are required. The results are available in /root/detection_results.csv as specified.",
  "commands": [],
  "task_complete": true
}
